case_title: MAJID JAZAYERI VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,200.00 FILED BY JAZAYERI, MAJID AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
